title: Ability to 'reply' to the email thread within Mobile App
excerpt:
Description
At this time it is only possible to send a ‘new’ email from the Monday.com mobile app. Replying to every email as a ‘new’ email is confusing and frustrating for the recipient of an email from the monday.com a…

posts.author: KaylaG123 (Kayla Germaniuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

At this time it is only possible to send a ‘new’ email from the Monday.com mobile app. Replying to every email as a ‘new’ email is confusing and frustrating for the recipient of an email from the monday.com app. If replying to a specific email it is only possible on the desktop version, which is not always accessible when replying to an email.

What are you trying to achieve

App switching is less efficient and makes the mobile app redundant for emailing. Which is a primary function for organization of the sales crm and some people prefer using their phones for daily emailing tasks and communication.
